analysis.name: Bitcoin SV
analysis.summary: BSV近期7日涨幅约4.6%，但24小时下跌3.2%，链上DEX版本（Solana上的BSV代币）流动性约153万美元，市值约305万美元，与主网BSV（市值2.48亿美元）不同。新闻面多为长期价格预测，缺乏短期实质性利好。基本面为比特币分叉币，争议较大，曾遭主要交易所下架。当前上涨动力不足，风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 无明确买入逻辑，若出现重大合作或技术突破可重新评估

catalysts: 长期价格预测文章（目标$100）可能吸引投机关注
Solana链上BSV代币流动性尚可，但非原生BSV

latestNews.reason: 网络安全事件，损害信任

fundamentals: BSV是比特币现金（BCH）的分叉币，旨在恢复中本聪原始愿景
主网BSV市值约2.48亿美元，排名142
Solana链上BSV代币为跨链或仿盘，非原生BSV，市值仅305万美元
总供应量2100万，流通2004.86万，接近全流通
marketRead: 主网BSV 24小时下跌3.2%，7日上涨4.6%，但30日下跌11.5%，整体弱势
Solana链上BSV代币24小时微跌0.12%，流动性153万美元，交易量仅8.1万美元，活跃度低
无近期价格突破迹象，成交量萎缩
risks: BSV争议大，曾遭Binance、Coinbase下架，Craig Wright被指欺诈
曾遭受51%攻击，网络安全性存疑
Solana链上BSV代币非原生，存在合约风险和流动性风险
缺乏短期催化剂，新闻多为长期预测，无实质利好
市场情绪偏空，持有者信心不足
watchlist: BSV主网是否有重大技术升级或合作
Solana链上BSV代币的流动性变化
整体加密货币市场走势
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，Solana链上BSV代币与主网BSV不同，需区分
新闻多为价格预测，缺乏时效性强的实质性消息

profile.name: Bitcoin SV
profile.description: Bitcoin SV (BSV) emerged following a hard fork of the Bitcoin Cash (BCH) blockchain in 2018, which had in turn forked from the BTC blockchain a year earlier. The goal of Bitcoin SV is to fulfil the original vision of the Bitcoin protocol and design as described in Satoshi Nakamoto’s white paper, early Bitcoin client software and known Satoshi writings. BSV aims to offer scalability and stability in line with the original description of Bitcoin as a peer-to-peer electronic cash system, as well as deliver a distributed data network that can support enterprise-level advanced blockchain applications. To this end, it has removed artificial block size limits and re-enabled Script commands and other technical capabilities which had been historically disabled or restricted by the protocol developers of the BTC blockchain. This allows the network to process tens of thousands of transactions per second while maintaining extremely low transaction fees for micropayments, in addition to offering advanced capabilities such as tokens, smart contracts, computation and other data use cases.
